item.title: Fixing a Failed Fifth Wheel
item.description: Watch the repair of a failed fifth wheel on a Schneider slider. How is the problem solved to keep rolling?

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Failed Fifth Wheel
media:content.media:description: Watch the repair of a failed fifth wheel on a Schneider slider. How is the problem solved to keep rolling?

item.title: Mississippi River Incident: Same Spot, New Truck
item.description: Another truck runs into trouble at the same Mississippi River spot. Why does this location cause repeated incidents?

media:content.media:title: Mississippi River Incident: Same Spot, New Truck
media:content.media:description: Another truck runs into trouble at the same Mississippi River spot. Why does this location cause repeated incidents?

item.title: Towing a Rolls‑Royce Correctly
item.description: See the careful process of towing a Rolls‑Royce the right way. What precautions protect such a luxury car?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Rolls‑Royce Correctly
media:content.media:description: See the careful process of towing a Rolls‑Royce the right way. What precautions protect such a luxury car?

item.title: Secure and Good to Go
item.description: With everything locked down, the vehicle is good to go. How does proper securing ensure smooth transport?

media:content.media:title: Secure and Good to Go
media:content.media:description: With everything locked down, the vehicle is good to go. How does proper securing ensure smooth transport?

item.title: Safe to Tow, Ready to Go
item.description: A vehicle is secured and ready for towing. What makes this process safe and efficient?

media:content.media:title: Safe to Tow, Ready to Go
media:content.media:description: A vehicle is secured and ready for towing. What makes this process safe and efficient?

item.title: School Bus Lifted High
item.description: See the dramatic sight of a school bus in the air during recovery. How was this heavy lift accomplished?

media:content.media:title: School Bus Lifted High
media:content.media:description: See the dramatic sight of a school bus in the air during recovery. How was this heavy lift accomplished?

item.title: Semi and SUV Collision!
item.description: A semi collides with an SUV, creating chaos on the road. What steps are taken to clear the scene safely?

media:content.media:title: Semi and SUV Collision!
media:content.media:description: A semi collides with an SUV, creating chaos on the road. What steps are taken to clear the scene safely?

item.title: Roadside Disaster Unfolds
item.description: Watch as a situation spirals into disaster, testing patience and skill. How will it be brought under control?

media:content.media:title: Roadside Disaster Unfolds
media:content.media:description: Watch as a situation spirals into disaster, testing patience and skill. How will it be brought under control?

item.title: Struggles on the Road
item.description: See the tough moments when the team faces challenges on the road. How do they push through the hard times?

media:content.media:title: Struggles on the Road
media:content.media:description: See the tough moments when the team faces challenges on the road. How do they push through the hard times?
